---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to see in DripMeter? What's currently in your
way? Describe the situation in user-level terms — the agent, the
workflow, the metric you want exposed.

## Proposed solution

Your best guess at what DripMeter should do. Be specific about
which tab it lands on (Overview / Stats / Agents / Files / Live),
the layout, the data source. A rough sketch or screenshot mockup
is fine; we'll iterate.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is the right
fit. If you considered "do nothing," say what makes that
unsatisfying.

## Data availability

Does DRIP already expose the data this needs (via `drip meter --json`
or directly in `sessions.db`)? If not, the feature may need to land
in DRIP first — link the upstream issue if there is one.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art, transcripts.
